import React, { useEffect, useState } from "react"; import { Link, useNavigate } from "react-router-dom"; import axios from "../api/axios"; import Reviews from "../components/Reviews"; import Footer from "../components/Footer"; const FALLBACK = "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1493238792000-8113da705763?auto=format&fit=crop&w=800&q=80"; const Home = () => { const [cars, setCars] = useState([]); const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true); const navigate = useNavigate(); useEffect(() => { axios.get("/cars") .then(res => setCars(Array.isArray(res.data) ? res.data.filter(c => c.available) : [])) .catch(() => setCars([])) .finally(() => setLoading(false)); }, []); return (
{/* HERO */}
⚡ Premium Fleet Available Now

Drive Your
Dream Car
Today

Luxury, economy, SUVs — our entire fleet is available for instant booking. No hidden fees, full transparency.

50+
Cars Available
2k+
Happy Customers
24/7
Support
{/* CARS */}
Our Fleet

Available Cars

Choose from our handpicked selection of premium vehicles

{loading &&
Loading fleet...
} {!loading && cars.length === 0 && (
🚗
No cars available right now
Check back soon — we're always adding new vehicles.
)} {!loading && cars.length > 0 && (
{cars.map(car => (
navigate(`/cars/${car._id}`)}>
{ e.target.src = FALLBACK; }} />
Available
{car.name}
{car.brand}
⛽ {car.fuelType} ⚙️ {car.transmission} 🪑 {car.seats} seats
₹{car.pricePerDay}/day
))}
)}
{/* HOW IT WORKS */}
Process

How It Works

Book your perfect ride in three simple steps

{[ { n:"01", icon:"🚗", title:"Choose Your Car", desc:"Browse our premium fleet and pick the perfect vehicle for your journey." }, { n:"02", icon:"📋", title:"Book & Register", desc:"Create a free account, select your dates, and confirm your booking instantly." }, { n:"03", icon:"✅", title:"Hit the Road", desc:"Receive admin confirmation and pick up your car. Enjoy the drive!" }, ].map(s => (
{s.n}
{s.icon}

{s.title}

{s.desc}

))}
); }; export default Home;
